chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D – 7213 of 2019 Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.31900/2019 2. For hearing of main case 21.09.2021 Mr. Muhammad Umer Lakhani, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG Mr. Liaquat Ali Abro and Mr. Nadeem Ahmed Qureshi, Law Officers, Law Department, Government of Sindh. ----------------------------------- Paragraph 2 of comments filed by respondent No.2 is that: - “ln this regard, it is submitted that the request for allowing the up-gradation, change of nomenclature, creation of new posts and sanctioned strength of posts in sub-ordinate Court of Sindh was initiated by Law Department in consultation with the Registrar, High Court of Sindh, Karachi which does not include the up-gradation of post of Stenographer (BPS-16) to (BPS-17) (Annexure-I). Accordingly, the Up-gradation notification was issued by the Finance Department, Government of Sindh dated 21.02.2018 (Annexure-II).” Accordingly, Registrar of Sindh High Court shall submit comments with regard to the position of the Stenographers in terms under what circumstances they were not recommended for up-gradation. To come up on 06.10.2021. JUDGE JUDGE Zahid/*
